list.expr: (sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1)) > 0.02
list.name: ① retrans>2%

list.expr: (max(sum by (nodename) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster="$aistor_cluster",device!~"lo|cali.*|lxc.*|veth.*|docker.*|br.*|cni.*|tunl.*|nodelocaldns"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8 * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"}))) / clamp_min(avg(sum by (nodename) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster="$aistor_cluster",device!~"lo|cali.*|lxc.*|veth.*|docker.*|br.*|cni.*|tunl.*|nodelocaldns"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8 * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"}))),1)) > 2
list.name: AIStor 불균형>2

description: Retrans(①)→softnet squeeze(②)→RX drop(③) 시간순 인과 입증. RX=$cluster/$nodename(icdataops-prd), AIStor=$aistor_cluster(storage-cluster).

options.content:
## Retrans → Squeeze → Drop 인과 분석
**채택 가설(해석 A)**: 대역폭 포화가 아니라, 특정 서비스 flow가 **AIStor 특정 노드로 집중**되어 처리 지연/지터 → **조기·spurious 재전송(①)** → 중복 트래픽 누적 → **NAPI budget 소진/softnet squeeze(②)** → RX ring overflow → **RX Drop(③)**. drop이 재전송을 다시 부르는 악순환(spiral).

**검증 순서**: 시간축에서 ①이 가장 먼저, ②가 그다음, ③이 마지막에 오르면 가설 지지. *시차(lag)* 패널에서 `$lag`(초)로 ①을 shift 했을 때 ③과 겹치는 지점이 경험적 lead time.

**드릴다운**: L0 Fleet → 노드 클릭 → L1 Node Hub → 상단 `🔗 Retrans 인과`(이 대시보드). **라벨**: RX·드롭 측 `$cluster/$nodename`(icdataops-prd) · AIStor hotspot `$aistor_cluster`(storage-cluster). 색: ①=🟣 · ②=🟠 · ③=🔴.

panels.title: 🔗 인과 한눈에 — ①→②→③ 동시 관찰 (shared crosshair)

targets.expr: sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1)

sum(rate(node_softnet_times_squeezed_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

panels.description: 최종 결과: NIC RX drop rate

targets.expr: sum(rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

panels.title: ③ RX drop

panels.description: 단위가 다른 세 신호를 구간 최대로 정규화해 선후 비교. ①이 먼저 오르면 가설 지지.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1)) / (scalar(max_over_time((sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1))[$__range:1m])) + 0.0000001)

(sum(rate(node_softnet_times_squeezed_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))) / (scalar(max_over_time((sum(rate(node_softnet_times_squeezed_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})))[$__range:1m])) + 0.0000001)

(sum(rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))) / (scalar(max_over_time((sum(rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})))[$__range:1m])) + 0.0000001)

panels.title: 정규화 오버레이 ①②③ (0–1)

panels.description: 교차상관 근사: offset으로 ①(retrans)을 `$lag`초 앞당겨 ③과 겹친다. 점선이 빨강과 가장 잘 포개지는 `$lag`이 ①→③ lead time.

targets.expr: (sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1)) / (scalar(max_over_time((sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1))[$__range:1m])) + 0.0000001)

(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval] offset $lag) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval] offset $lag) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1)) / (scalar(max_over_time((sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval] offset $lag) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval] offset $lag) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1))[$__range:1m])) + 0.0000001)

(sum(rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))) / (scalar(max_over_time((sum(rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})))[$__range:1m])) + 0.0000001)

panels.title: ⏱️ 시차(lag) 정량화 — ①을 $lag shift vs ③

options.content:
### ①→③ lead time
# `$lag`
위 패널에서 보라 점선(−$lag)이 빨강과 가장 잘 겹치도록 `$lag`을 조절.

panels.description: CurrEstab — flow 집중 시 동반 증가 경향

targets.expr: sum(node_netstat_Tcp_CurrEstab{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"} * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

panels.title: 현재 TCP 연결수

options.content:
- **①→②→③** 순서면 가설 지지. 동시·역순이면 재검토.
- ③(빨강)이 보라 점선과 겹치면 ①이 `$lag`초 앞서 ③을 유발.
- spurious 근거 + AIStor 집중 동반 시 신뢰도↑.

targets.expr: sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_RetransSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})) / clamp_min(sum(rate(node_netstat_Tcp_OutSegs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})), 1)

panels.description: SpuriousRTOs·DSACKRecv·LostRetransmit 동반 상승 = 지연/지터 기인 재전송(대역폭 포화 배제).

targets.expr: sum(rate(node_netstat_TcpExt_TCPSpuriousRTOs{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

sum(rate(node_netstat_TcpExt_TCPDSACKRecv{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

sum(rate(node_netstat_TcpExt_TCPLostRetransmit{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

panels.title: Spurious 재전송 근거
② softnet time_squeeze — NAPI budget 소진 (🟠 주황)

panels.description: time_squeezed(주황) 상승에 softnet drop이 따라오면 budget 소진→backlog drop.

targets.expr: sum(rate(node_softnet_times_squeezed_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

sum(rate(node_softnet_dropped_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

panels.title: ② squeeze / softnet drop

targets.expr: max(node_softnet_backlog_len{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"} * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

sum(rate(node_softnet_processed_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"}))

panels.title: ③ RX Drop — 최종 결과 (🔴 빨강)

targets.expr: rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})

panels.description: receive_fifo = ring overflow 직접 신호 ({{nodename}}·{{device}}). drop과 동반 확인.

targets.expr: rate(node_network_receive_fifo_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})

panels.title: RX fifo / ring overflow
🔥 AIStor flow 집중 — root trigger 근거 (storage-cluster)

panels.description: AIStor 노드별 수신 bps({{nodename}}). 특정 노드 쏠림=flow 집중=1차 트리거 근거.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (nodename) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster="$aistor_cluster",device!~"lo|cali.*|lxc.*|veth.*|docker.*|br.*|cni.*|tunl.*|nodelocaldns"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8 * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"})))

panels.title: 노드별 인입 대역폭 (top 10)

targets.expr: max(sum by (nodename) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster="$aistor_cluster",device!~"lo|cali.*|lxc.*|veth.*|docker.*|br.*|cni.*|tunl.*|nodelocaldns"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8 * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"}))) / clamp_min(avg(sum by (nodename) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster="$aistor_cluster",device!~"lo|cali.*|lxc.*|veth.*|docker.*|br.*|cni.*|tunl.*|nodelocaldns"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8 * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"}))), 1)

panels.description: 상위 AIStor 노드. 행 클릭 → 해당 노드 L1.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (nodename) (rate(node_network_receive_bytes_total{cluster="$aistor_cluster",device!~"lo|cali.*|lxc.*|veth.*|docker.*|br.*|cni.*|tunl.*|nodelocaldns"}[$__rate_interval]) * 8 * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"})))
sum by (nodename) (node_netstat_Tcp_CurrEstab{cluster="$aistor_cluster"} * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$aistor_cluster"}))

panels.title: 🔝 Top hot node (인입 bps · 연결수)

options.content:
AIStor/MinIO 메트릭 수집 시 노드별 요청 분포로 flow 집중을 직접 입증. 실제 메트릭명 확인 후 패널 추가:
- `minio_s3_requests_total` by server/node → 요청 불균형 · `minio_inter_node_traffic_*` → placeholder.

panels.description: CPU별 time_squeezed. 특정 CPU 쏠림이면 RPS/RSS·IRQ affinity 대상.

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (cpu) (rate(node_softnet_times_squeezed_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})))

panels.title: per-CPU squeeze (선택 노드, top 8)

targets.expr: topk(8, sum by (cpu) (rate(node_softnet_dropped_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})))

rate(node_network_receive_drop_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})

rate(node_network_receive_fifo_total{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",instance=~"$instance",device=~"$device"}[$__rate_interval]) * on(instance) group_left(nodename) topk by(instance)(1, node_uname_info{cluster="$cluster",project="$project",nodename=~"$nodename"})

panels.title: device별 RX drop vs fifo (선택 노드)

options.content:
**드릴다운**: 상단 `Packet Drop ▾`(묶음) · `↑ L1` · `↑↑ L0`. AIStor Top 테이블 행 클릭 → 해당 노드 L1.

**알림 예시(선택)**: ① retrans ratio > 2% 5분 지속 **AND** ③ rx_drop > 0 동시 → 발화. 규칙은 README §알림 규칙 예시.

title: L2 · Retrans→Squeeze→Drop 인과 분석
